allow: Bash(node -e "const {AUDIT_ITEMS} = require\('/Users/timblack/Development/Muse/CROAuditSPA_V1/audit-items.js'\); const lifts = AUDIT_ITEMS.map\(i => i.lift_max\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>a-b\); console.log\('Min:', lifts[0], 'Max:', lifts[lifts.length-1]\); console.log\('>=0.30:', AUDIT_ITEMS.filter\(i=>i.lift_max>=0.30\).length\); console.log\('0.15-0.29:', AUDIT_ITEMS.filter\(i=>i.lift_max>=0.15&&i.lift_max<0.30\).length\); console.log\('<0.15:', AUDIT_ITEMS.filter\(i=>i.lift_max<0.15\).length\); console.log\('All lift_max values:', [...new Set\(lifts\)]\);")

Bash(node -e "eval\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/Users/timblack/Development/Muse/CROAuditSPA_V1/audit-items.js','utf8'\)\); const lifts = AUDIT_ITEMS.map\(i => i.lift_max\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>a-b\); console.log\('Min:', lifts[0], 'Max:', lifts[lifts.length-1]\); console.log\('>=0.30:', AUDIT_ITEMS.filter\(i=>i.lift_max>=0.30\).length\); console.log\('0.15-0.29:', AUDIT_ITEMS.filter\(i=>i.lift_max>=0.15&&i.lift_max<0.30\).length\); console.log\('<0.15:', AUDIT_ITEMS.filter\(i=>i.lift_max<0.15\).length\); console.log\('Unique values:', [...new Set\(lifts\)]\);")
